'''âm-h-k-d''' ('''kamahkedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chattelize|chattelize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-h-k-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chattelize|chattelize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-h-k-d
|-
! Lemma
| kamahkedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimahkedoko|thimahkedoko]] || [[word:jimahkedoko|jimahkedoko]] || [[word:shimahkedoko|shimahkedoko]] || [[word:kimahkedoko|kimahkedoko]]
|-

|-
